MuayThaiChampionPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_17_Payout1_1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol and Combo Wild symbol.
MuayThaiChampionPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_18_Payout1_2: Combo Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
MuayThaiChampionPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1Payout2_1: 1 or more Red Fighter symbol and/or Blue Fighter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Fighter Feature.
MuayThaiChampionPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2Payout2_2: During the Fighter Feature, for every Fighter symbol on the reels, a Wild symbol will appear on a randomly chosen symbol position.
MuayThaiChampionPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: 3, 4 or 5 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 8, 12 or 15 free spins respectively.
MuayThaiChampionPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: Wild symbols from the Fighter Feature triggered during any free spins will stay on the reels as Combo Wild symbols until the end of the Free Spins Feature.
MuayThaiChampionPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_2_Payout4_2: The maximum win amount is %{15000}x of the bet amount.
MuayThaiChampionPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_3_Payout4_3: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{15000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.

MuayThaiChampionRules.Rule1_1: Muay Thai Champion is a 5-reel, 3-row video slot featuring Wild symbols additions and free spins with sticky Wild symbols.

Rule1_2.value: The game is played with 20 bet lines (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule1_2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
Rule1_2.example: The game is played with 20 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 1.0.

MuayThaiChampionRules.Rule1_8: "Auto Spin" automatically plays the game for a selected number of rounds.
MuayThaiChampionRules.Rule1_19: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
MuayThaiChampionRules.Rule2_3: The randomly chosen symbol position does not include symbol position with Wild symbol or Scatter symbol.
MuayThaiChampionRules.Rule3_3: Scatter symbol does not appear during Free Spins Feature.
